zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Pidge於1624年12月25日出生在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登時，她的父親Thomas Pidge41歲，母親Mary Martha Sothy35歲。她於1639年7月10日與Nicholas Wood在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1663年2月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可梅德費爾德享年38歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可梅德費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Pidge于1624年12月25日出生在英国艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登时，她的父亲Thomas Pidge41岁，母亲Mary Martha Sothy35岁。她于1639年7月10日与Nicholas Wood在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1663年2月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可梅德費爾德享年38岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可梅德費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Pidge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a ridge, Middle English rigge (Old English hrycg) ‘ridge’, or a habitational name from any of the minor places so named. It is synonymous with West Midlands Rudge and northern Rigg . The surname is also fairly common in Ireland, in County Galway, having been taken to Connacht in the early 17th century. The name is sometimes Gaelicized as Mac Iomaire; iomaire being modern Irish for ‘ridge’. Compare Attridge .
sometimes perhaps a variant of   Rich   with voicing of the formerly medial consonant.

variants.name: Rigg
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of the many minor placenames in northern England named with Middle English rigg (Old Norse hryggr) ‘ridge’. Compare the synonymous Ridge .
German: from a short form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names based on the element rīc ‘power(ful)’. This surname is very rare in Germany.
Altered form of Swiss German Rüegg (see Ruegg ).

variants.name: Ridges
meanings: English (Hampshire and Surrey): variant of Ridge , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Pidge was born on 25 December 1624, in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, her father, Thomas Pidge, was 41 and her mother, Mary Martha Sothy, was 35. She married Nicholas Wood on 10 July 1639, in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 19 February 1663, in Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 38, and was buried in Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Pidge est née le 25 décembre 1624, à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Pidge, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mary Martha Sothy, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Wood le 10 juillet 1639, à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 février 1663, à Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Pidge am 25. Dezember 1624 in Saffron Walden, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Pidge 41 und ihre Mutter Mary Martha Sothy 35. Sie hat am 10. Juli 1639 in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Nicholas Wood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. Februar 1663 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Pidge è nata il il 25 dicembre 1624 nel Saffron Walden, Essex, England, sua padre, Thomas Pidge, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Mary Martha Sothy, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Wood il 10 luglio 1639, nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 19 febbraio 1663, nel Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Pidgeが1624年12月25日にイギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンで生まれた時，父Thomas Pidgeは41歳，母Mary Martha Sothyは35歳であった。1639年7月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーでNicholas Woodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1663年2月19日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクメドフィールドで38歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクメドフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이
ko.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이

ko.Medfield, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Pidge(이)가 1624년 12월 25일 영국 에세스 사프런 월든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Pidge(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Martha Sothy(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1639년 7월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 Nicholas Wood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1663년 2월 19일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 메드필드에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 메드필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Pidge nasceu em 25 de dezembro de 1624, em Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Pidge, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mary Martha Sothy, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Wood em 10 de julho de 1639, em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de fevereiro de 1663, em Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Pidge родилась 25 декабря 1624 г. в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Pidge было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Martha Sothy, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Wood 10 июля 1639 г. в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 19 февраля 1663 г. в местности медфиелд, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности медфиелд, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Pidge nació el 25 de diciembre de 1624, en Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Pidge, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Mary Martha Sothy, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Nicholas Wood el 10 de julio de 1639, en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 19 de febrero de 1663, en Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
